creator: j@uriah.heep.sax.de
text:
As Cy Schubert wrote:

> I just updated fwbuilder to 4.0.0 in CVS. I can't recreate the problem
> locally. Could you try it out and let me know if it fixes your problem?

No, it's still the same:

FWWindow::ruleMenuAboutToShow ()
FWWindow::cleanRulesMenu ()
terminate called after throwing an instance of 'libfwbuilder::FWException'

[1]    Abort                         fwbuilder (core dumped)

This is the stack trace as recorded in the core file:

(gdb) bt
#0  0x2a21b737 in thr_kill () from /lib/libc.so.7
#1  0x2a1cf646 in pthread_kill () from /lib/libthr.so.3

   from /usr/lib/libstdc++.so.6
#5  0x2a11f1da in std::set_unexpected () from /usr/lib/libstdc++.so.6
#6  0x2a11f222 in std::terminate () from /usr/lib/libstdc++.so.6

    event_type=0) at kernel/qcoreapplication.cpp:1140
#10 0x29e2088f in postEventSourceDispatch (s=0x8b07d00)
    at qcoreapplication.h:218
#11 0x29f3fcf3 in IA__g_main_context_dispatch (context=0x8b2f080)
    at gmain.c:1960

    dispatch=1, self=0x8b0a6d0) at gmain.c:2591
#13 0x29f4331c in IA__g_main_context_iteration (context=0x8b2f080, may_block=1)
    at gmain.c:2654
#14 0x29e20d1e in QEventDispatcherGlib::processEvents (this=0x8b16070, 
    flags=@0xbfbfe978) at kernel/qeventdispatcher_glib.cpp:327

    flags=@0xbfbfe9a8) at kernel/qguieventdispatcher_glib.cpp:202
